title: False-Morning Routine
summary: Ada wakes into a warm, lived-in pre-shift ritual that establishes voice trust, place texture, and low-friction onboarding.

narrative.newInfo: Ada's baseline cognition and routine discipline are established before any overt anomaly pressure.
narrative.dripHook: The comfort of routine makes small deviations easier to feel and harder to ignore.
narrative.notes: Use inference-driven environmental detail; prioritize inhabitable atmosphere over plot acceleration.

rewardTokens.description: Warm home details create effortless narrative entry.
Reader-Ada trust bond forms through interior proximity.
